body_preview: Job ID 4669018006 redirects to general job board with ?error=true. Posting was live when package was built (2026-06-12) but has been taken down. Gong currently shows 93 open roles, none in Talent Development/L&D. People/HR section only shows Compensation Director and EMEA GTM Sourcer.
notes: Posting closed overnight 2026-06-12->2026-06-13. No hard-stop language present in original JD. Role simply filled or was pulled. Package is clean and ready if the role re-posts.
